name: Harris Piano Jazz Bar
description: Underground jazz club on Rynek Główny — live music every night spanning jazz, blues, funk, soul, hip-hop. Self-described as the only club in Poland (and one of two in Europe) offering original jazz concerts every day. Drinks, food, and a sub-cellar vibe.
notes: Mon–Fri from 13:00 · Sat–Sun from 12:00 · open until last guest. Concerts most nights from ~21:30.

items.name: Style
items.description: Underground cellar club — small, drinks + bar food

items.name: Cover
items.description: Some concerts ticketed — check the events page for the night
